_comment_v1_4_coffee: V1.4 (2026-05-12): four coffee_reaction_* states added per minigames.txt §Character reactions §Crab. Two outcomes (Perfect = procedurally_alert_plus; Bad = over_caffeinated), each in pre- and post-recruit variants per the design brief's address-form rule (Crab uses 'Cula' only after recruited_crab flips; pre-recruit uses 'Dr. A. Cula'). In normal play, coffee_buff is only set after recruited_whimsy, which is gated downstream of recruited_crab — so the pre-recruit variants are practically unreachable. They exist for completeness per the design brief. Reactions are placed AFTER the engagement states and BEFORE after_engagement so they win priority during the buff window. !entered_court scopes them to pre-court.

_legacy._note: Phase-6 lines replaced by Phase-7 V1.2 pass 3. Original lines violated Phase-6 Hit #3 (self-explaining-stance discipline: Crab explaining his own character rather than doing the work).
before_meeting_lines: Dr. A. Cula. If anyone asks, I was already suspicious before the facts arrived.
I check the facts. I do not arrange them to look prettier.
_legacy.after_meeting_line: The facts are not beautiful, but they are standing in the right order.

states._comment_v1_2_p6: Phase 7 V1.2 pass 6 dialogue. Sikorska file reference per V1.4 canonical case content. Pass-3 'Borowski file' provisional state superseded.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Crab. I'm Cula. I could use a second pair of eyes on the Sikorska file before fourteen hundred.

lines: The binder is not in the room. I cannot check service without the binder.

states._comment_intro_rule: Fused intro + binder hand-off for the path where Cula collects the procedural binder before speaking to Crab. Required by AGENTS.md §First-meeting introductions: an inventory hand-off line ('Here.') must not stand as the first word spoken between Cula and Crab. Sets both met_crab and recruited_crab because the binder hand-off IS the recruitment beat in this branch.

lines.speaker: cula
lines.text: Crab. I'm Cula. The binder — service on the Sikorska notice. Need a second pair of eyes before fourteen hundred.

lines: The binder cites Article 132. The notice mentions service. I can check that.

states.trigger: chapter1.met_crab == true && chapter1.has_law_binder == true && chapter1.recruited_crab == false
lines: The binder cites Article 132. The notice mentions service. I can check that.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — S-grade, post-recruit. Voice verbatim from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Crab Perfect ('No obvious flaws. Disturbing.'). Crab addresses Cula by bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms (Crab uses 'Cula' only after recruitment).
V1.4 coffee reaction — D/F-grade, post-recruit. Voice verbatim from minigames.txt §Character reactions §Crab Bad ('That is not coffee. That is witness intimidation.').
states.line: Cula. That is not coffee. That is witness intimidation.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — S-grade, pre-recruit. Authored for completeness per design brief; in normal play coffee_buff is only set after recruited_whimsy, which is downstream of recruited_crab — so this branch is practically unreachable. Pre-recruit Crab uses 'Dr. A. Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
states.line: Dr. A. Cula. No obvious flaws. Disturbing.

states._comment: V1.4 coffee reaction — D/F-grade, pre-recruit. Same scope note as the perfect pre-recruit variant; pre-recruit Crab uses 'Dr. A. Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
states.line: Dr. A. Cula. That is not coffee. That is witness intimidation.

states._comment: V1.5 post-recruitment progression. Fires after the client meeting, before archive research is complete. Crab's factual domain is the service certificate — he nudges Cula toward the archive. Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms (post-recruit).
states.line: Cula. The service address is in the archive. Someone filed a certificate. Check whether the certificate describes a door that exists.

states.trigger: chapter1.recruited_crab == true && chapter1.archive_research_complete == true && chapter1.court_ready == false && !chapter1.entered_court
states._comment: V1.5 post-recruitment progression. Fires once archive research is complete but court_ready is not yet set. Crab's quiet approval before the hearing. Voice from crab_global_013. Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
states.line: The facts are not beautiful, but they are standing in the right order.

states._comment: V1.5 generic fallback repeat beat — fires when no more specific post-recruitment state matches (e.g. before halina_met, or between milestones). Bare 'Cula' per AGENTS.md §Address forms.
states.line: Cula. If we go in now, we will be making an argument with decorative gaps.

idle_flavor: The office is quiet. Either nothing happened, or the evidence is hiding better than usual.
